meta-description: Learn about households and health insurance by reviewing the definition in the HealthCare.gov Glossary.
title: Household
excerpt: The Marketplace generally considers your household to be you, your spouse if you’re married, and your tax dependents. Your eligibility for savings is generally based on the income of all household members, even those who don’t need insurance.
content:
The Marketplace generally considers your household to be you, your spouse if you’re married, and your tax dependents. Your eligibility for savings is generally based on the income of all household members, even those who don’t need insurance.
